title: AI Assistant
subtitle: Your manuscript's creative partner
emptyState.heading: Your creative companion
emptyState.description: AI that reads every chapter, finds what you can't see, and helps you tell a better story.
emptyState.features.title: WHAT AI CAN DO
emptyState.features.clarity.title: See your manuscript clearly
emptyState.features.clarity.description: Which chapters drag? Where does tension peak? An honest mirror for your prose.
emptyState.features.stuck.title: When you're stuck, ask
emptyState.features.stuck.description: Plot holes, pacing, character arcs — a writing partner who's read every page.
emptyState.features.polish.title: Polish before you share
emptyState.features.polish.description: From rough draft to ready — consistency checks, style notes, and a final read-through.
emptyState.features.opinion.title: Get a second opinion
emptyState.features.opinion.description: Line-by-line feedback on voice, clarity, and flow — like a trusted editor on call.
commandCenter.label: COMMAND CENTER
commandCenter.preparation.title: Preparation
commandCenter.preparation.description: Analyze your entire manuscript. Build context for all AI features.
commandCenter.beautify.title: Beautify
commandCenter.beautify.description: Polish prose, fix grammar, and smooth transitions across chapters.
commandCenter.beautify.perChapterHint: For best results, run beautify per chapter from the editor so you can review each change.
commandCenter.beautify.confirmBody: This will beautify all {{count}} chapters. Each chapter will be polished for grammar, prose, and transitions.
commandCenter.prosePass.title: Prose Pass
commandCenter.prosePass.description: Deep revision for style, voice, and narrative consistency.
commandCenter.prosePass.perChapterHint: For best results, run prose pass per chapter from the editor so you can review each change.
commandCenter.prosePass.confirmBody: This will run a deep prose revision on all {{count}} chapters. Each chapter will be revised for style, voice, and consistency.
health.label: MANUSCRIPT HEALTH
health.quality.excellent: Your manuscript shows strong craft across all dimensions.
health.quality.good: Solid foundation with room for targeted improvements.
health.quality.fair: Several areas would benefit from focused revision.
health.quality.needsWork: Consider addressing the weakest areas before proceeding.
chapters.label: ANALYZED CHAPTERS
usage.label: USAGE THIS MONTH
